allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Cool Bros Tanks - Artillery Game

Features:
- Full menu system with player selection \(2-8 players\)
- AI difficulty configuration \(Human, Easy, Normal, Hard\)
- 5 different maps \(Flat Plains, Rolling Hills, Mountain Range, Canyon, Plateau\)
- 3 weapon types \(Missile, Cluster Bomb, Bouncing Round\)
- Doubled damage values
- Ricochet physics off screen edges
- One shot per turn \(prevents spamming\)
- Exit to menu with ESC key
- Game ends if all humans are killed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
